channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.
channel.copyright: Copyright:(C) Mon, 15 Jun 2026 10:53:01 IST Bennett Coleman & Co. Ltd, http://in.indiatimes.com/policyterms/1554651.cms

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: Tear gas, burning Tesla and smashed windows: 20,000 protest G7 summit in Geneva ahead of Trump's arrival
item.description: Geneva witnessed clashes as thousands protested the G7 summit, with police using tear gas against stone-throwing demonstrators. While most of the 20,000 marchers remained peaceful, a "Black Bloc" of militants caused damage, including setting a car ablaze and smashing bank windows. Organizers had prepared extensively, but violence erupted, leading to arrests and heightened security for the upcoming summit in France.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Lebanon ceasefire, Hormuz reopening, sanctions relief: What the 14-point US-Iran peace deal contains
item.description: A draft memorandum between the US and Iran reportedly includes an immediate end to military operations, lifting of sanctions on oil exports, and a $300 billion reconstruction package. The agreement, expected to be signed June 19, focuses on ending hostilities and paving the way for future nuclear talks.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Elon Musk claims: ‘SpaceX could hit $1 trillion in revenue by 2030’; far beyond Morgan Stanley's projection
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Trump Coins: Silver and gold medallions bearing Trump's face, 'designed' by him, cost up to $12,000
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Israel will not withdraw from Lebanon': What Netanyahu told Trump on US-Iran peace deal
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'He has no judgement': Trump 'pissed off' with Netanyahu over Israeli strike in Lebanon 'hour before the deal'
item.description: US President Donald Trump announced a finalized deal with Iran to end their conflict, despite a last-minute Israeli strike in Beirut that he claims nearly derailed the agreement. Trump expressed anger at Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu's actions, calling them "f*****g attack" with "no f*****g judgement." Despite the tensions, the deal is set for signing, with Iran still vowing retaliation.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Trump turns 80: UFC cage fight, Iran deal, fighter jet flyover mark US President's birthday - watch
item.description: President Donald Trump celebrated his 80th birthday with a UFC fight card on the White House South Lawn. The event, "UFC Freedom 250", also marked the 250th anniversary of the Declaration of Independence. Thousands gathered to watch cage fights. The White House grounds were transformed into an outdoor arena for the spectacle. This unusual sporting event occurred shortly after an agreement was announced to end the war with Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. The elaborate setup involved significant investment and labor.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Oliver Tree death: KSI remembers his friend with emotional tribute after tragic helicopter crash
item.description: KSI paid tribute to Oliver Tree after reports said the musician and content creator died in a helicopter crash in Rio de Janeiro on June 14, 2026. In an emotional message, KSI remembered his friend as a “lifelong legend” and shared personal photos from their friendship. Fans have since flooded social media with tributes and memories of the 32-year-old artist.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Who was Gaspi? Argentine YouTuber dies alongside Oliver Tree in Rio helicopter crash
item.description: Gaspar Prim Díaz, known online as Gaspi, was a 23-year-old Argentine YouTuber famous for his street comedy, improvised interviews, and signature greeting “Buenass.” He became one of Argentina’s most popular digital creators and later gained wider attention through La Velada del Año V. Gaspi died in the Rio de Janeiro helicopter crash that also killed singer Oliver Tree and four others.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Twitch streamer Clavicular revealed his post-surgery face as years of looksmaxxing content came under fire
item.description: Braden Peters, better known as Kick streamer Clavicular, went viral after asking viewers not to mock his swollen face following multiple cosmetic procedures. The request sparked strong reactions because of his long history of promoting extreme appearance-focused practices and criticizing looks. The debate has since expanded into a larger discussion about influencer culture, cosmetic trends, and online accountability.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: YouTuber Vlad Ncl punched during Dublin livestream as video sparks anti trans debate
item.description: Vlad Ncl was punched during a Dublin livestream after a stranger questioned his gender presentation while he was dressed as Natalia. The video quickly spread online, leading to heated debate about public safety, gender bias and prank content. While many condemned the attack, others questioned the risks involved in social experiments. Police have reportedly received video evidence, but no arrest has been announced.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Cristiano Ronaldo’s FIFA World Cup journey coincides with Georgina Rodriguez’s biggest professional achievement yet
item.description: Georgina Rodriguez has been named the new face of Italian fashion brand Calzedonia, revealing the partnership on social media on June 12, 2026, just one day after the FIFA World Cup began in North America. The announcement adds to a growing modelling portfolio that includes Dior, Moncler, and Charlotte Tilbury. Rodriguez, who has 73 million Instagram followers and her own Netflix series, met partner Cristiano Ronaldo in 2016 while working at a Gucci store in Madrid. Ronaldo is currently competing in his sixth FIFA World Cup, captaining Portugal for the fifth time.
item.dc:creator: Prantik Prabal Roy

item.title: 'JD was interested in my conversion and...': Usha Vance opens up on husband’s faith
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Donald Trump 'uncomfortable with ageing', says Tucker Carlson as US president turns 80
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Who is Austin Franco? US student says he was ‘not interested in working for a Jew’
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Lookmaxxing streamer Clavicular’s resurfaced 2025 video predicted his Miami future, reality tells a bigger story
item.description: An old July 2025 video of Clavicular resurfaced on X on June 14, 2026. In the clip, he talked about moving to Miami, building a business, and enjoying club life. Many people noticed that parts of that vision later became reality. The video has sparked discussion about his career, appearance changes, business ventures, and the path he has taken since then.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: ‘My mayor Muslim, my bagel’s Jewish’: How a Bangladeshi Knicks fan created a viral sensation
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Sunday Bloody Sunday: Trump warns Israel not to blow up Iran deal
item.dc:creator: Chidanand Rajghatta

item.title: How US government helped Elon Musk become the world’s first trillionaire
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: At 80, Trump chooses cage fight in an octagon over a rocking chair
item.description: Donald Trump marked his 80th birthday with a White House cage fight, a spectacle critics decried as vulgar while supporters hailed it as American exceptionalism. The event, dubbed 'UFC Freedom 250,' saw bare-knuckle combat on the South Lawn, replacing traditional presidential events.
item.dc:creator: Chidanand Rajghatta
